presentation.title: The platform is the proof.
presentation.summary: Portmason separates a system’s foundations, control surface, and operational lifecycle. The live tools below demonstrate combinations of those capabilities.
presentation.markNotice: Portmason Platform™, Portmason Operations™, Portmason Foundations™, Portmason Collections™, and Portmason Tooling™ are marks of Et al Solutions LLC.

platformModel.relationship: Foundations define the system. Tooling creates, validates, and controls it. Operations provisions, deploys, and runs it.

layers.name: Portmason Foundations™
layers.label: Foundations
layers.summary: Reusable structures, contracts, schemas, and project foundations.

layers.name: Portmason Operations™
layers.label: Operations
layers.summary: Provisioning, configuration, deployment, verification, and runtime adapters.

layers.name: Portmason Tooling™
layers.label: Tooling
layers.summary: The pm-* command surface that creates, validates, deploys, and inspects both.

presentation.gallerySummary: Each tool demonstrates more than one Portmason capability. The labels show what the tool proves; they do not define a one-to-one product relationship.
